caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing 14 kt winds with a 70% rain probability, while waves are reaching 6.0 ft in height. San Juan is seeing slightly stronger winds at 16 kt, as a low-pressure system brings increased wind and rain to the Eastern Caribbean, including Barbados with its less than 10% rain probability not being a concern today, instead, it's the 70% rain probability that's the focus.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Pick Up
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing 22 kt winds with a 53% rain probability, and wave heights are reaching 4.3 ft. Barcelona has lighter conditions with 13 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, making Marseille the top impact port in the Mediterranean today.
